name: cyber-persona
description: 赛博女友 — 基于 Hermes Agent 的角色扮演系统，支持情绪深度、TTS 语音、图片生成和游戏化

scripts.start: node cyber-gf-controller.js 开始赛博女友
scripts.test: node -e "require('./cyber-gf-state'); require('./cyber-gf-turn'); require('./cyber-gf-profile'); require('./cyber-gf-prompts'); require('./cyber-gf-gamification'); console.log('All modules loaded OK')"
